business.name: Coit Auto Repair & Tires
business.hours: Mon–Fri: 7:30 AM – 6:00 PM, Sat: 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM

seo.title: Coit Auto Repair & Tires | Expert Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Coit Auto Repair & Tires in Dallas, TX offers expert auto repair, brake service, oil changes, and tire replacement. Trusted mechanic serving North Dallas. Call (469) 776-8101 for reliable service.

hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair & Tire Services You Can Trust
hero.subheadline: Family-owned and operated, we provide honest, high-quality auto maintenance and repairs to keep you safe on the road.

featureSections.title: State-of-the-Art Computer Diagnostics
featureSections.body: Using the latest diagnostic equipment, we quickly identify issues with your engine, transmission, brakes, and electrical systems. No guesswork, just accurate results.
bullets: Advanced scanner for all makes and models
featureSections.cardBody: We provide upfront estimates and explain every repair before we start. No hidden fees, no surprises.

featureSections.title: New Tires & Expert Mounting
featureSections.body: From all-season to performance tires, we carry top brands at competitive prices. Our certified technicians ensure proper fitment and balancing for a smooth ride.
bullets: Free tire pressure check with every visit
featureSections.cardBody: Our brake service includes pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and fluid flush to keep you stopping safely.

home.whyTitle: Why Choose Coit Auto Repair & Tires?

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our ASE-certified mechanics have decades of combined experience with domestic and import vehicles.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: Most repairs completed same-day. We value your time and get you back on the road quickly.

whyChooseUs.title: Warranty on Repairs
whyChooseUs.description: All parts and labor come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty for your peace of mind.

whyChooseUs.title: Convenient Location
whyChooseUs.description: Easily accessible off Coit Road near I-635, with free shuttle service and loaner cars available.

testimonials.quote: They diagnosed my check engine light quickly and saved me hundreds compared to the dealer. Honest and professional.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: Best tire shop in Dallas! Great selection, fair prices, and they had me in and out in under an hour.
testimonials.author: Jessica T.

testimonials.quote: I trust Coit Auto with my whole family's cars. They always explain what's needed and never push unnecessary work.
testimonials.author: David L.

cta.headline: Ready for Reliable Auto Care?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the Coit Auto difference.

servicesPage.intro: From routine maintenance to major repairs, our full-service auto shop covers every need. Browse our services below and trust your vehicle to the experts at Coit Auto Repair & Tires.

services.title: Oil Change & Lube Service
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with our quick oil change service using premium oils.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the most important maintenance for your vehicle. We use high-quality synthetic and conventional oils, replace your oil filter, and perform a complimentary multi-point inspection with every service.

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: We drain old oil and replace with fresh oil of your choice.

process.title: Filter Change
process.description: New oil filter installed to prevent contaminants.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: Check belts, hoses, fluids, and lights at no extra cost.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most vehicles need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles. Check your owner's manual or ask our technicians.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer both conventional and synthetic oil options. We recommend synthetic for newer vehicles.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Restore stopping power with professional brake pad, rotor, and caliper service.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and brake lines, then recommend the right repair to ensure safe stopping every time.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: Measure pad thickness, rotor wear, and check fluid condition.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Replace worn pads, resurface or replace rotors, and lubricate calipers.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test your brakes at low and high speeds to confirm proper function.

faqs.question: How do I know if my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, a soft pedal, or vibration when braking are signs it's time for a check.

faqs.question: How long does a brake job take?
faqs.answer: Most brake pad replacements take 1-2 hours. Rotor replacement may take longer.

services.title: Tire Sales & Installation
services.shortDescription: Top brands at great prices with expert mounting, balancing, and alignment.
services.longDescription: We carry a wide selection of tires from leading manufacturers. Our certified technicians mount and balance your new tires precisely, and we offer alignment services to maximize tread life.

process.title: Selection
process.description: We help you choose the best tire for your vehicle and driving needs.

process.title: Mount & Balance
process.description: Tires are mounted on rims and balanced to eliminate vibration.

process.title: Alignment Check
process.description: We recommend alignment to ensure even wear and straight handling.

faqs.question: Do you offer tire financing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options through our partners. Ask us for details.

faqs.question: Can you repair a flat tire?
faqs.answer: We can repair most punctures if the damage is in the tread area and not too large.

services.title: Check Engine Light Diagnostics
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnosis and repair for that mysterious dashboard warning.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on, trust our advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint the issue. We interpret trouble codes, inspect related components, and provide a clear repair plan.

process.title: Scan
process.description: We connect a diagnostic scanner to read error codes from your vehicle's computer.

process.title: Inspect
process.description: We check related parts like sensors, hoses, and wiring for visible issues.

process.title: Repair
process.description: We perform the necessary repair and clear the codes, then test drive to confirm.

faqs.question: Can I drive with the check engine light on?
faqs.answer: If the light is steady, it's usually safe to drive but you should get it checked soon. A flashing light indicates a serious problem.

faqs.question: How much does a diagnostic cost?
faqs.answer: Our diagnostic fee is $89, which is applied to the cost of any repair we perform.

about.headline: Your Neighborhood Auto Experts Since 2005
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair and tire services that keep Dallas drivers safe and satisfied.
story: Coit Auto Repair & Tires was founded in 2005 by a team of experienced mechanics who saw a need for trustworthy auto care in North Dallas. What started as a small two-bay shop has grown into a full-service facility serving thousands of customers. Our commitment to transparency, quality parts, and fair pricing has earned us a loyal following.

Today, we continue to invest in the latest technology and training to service all makes and models. Our ASE-certified technicians treat every vehicle as if it were their own, and we stand behind our work with solid warranties. Whether you need a simple oil change or a complex engine repair, you can count on Coit Auto for reliable, friendly service.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our quotes are honest and upfront.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use only OEM or better parts and employ highly trained technicians.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our top priority. We communicate clearly and respect your time.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We proudly support local schools and charities, giving back to the Dallas area.

contact.headline: Get In Touch
contact.subheadline: We're here to help with all your auto repair and tire needs.
